title: 日本ダービーの後に・スポットライトは

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Of course I'd lose. It was obvious.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I got too cocky without having the talent
to back it up.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah, this loss couldn't be helped. Yeah, that's it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The Derby was fun, wasn't it?! I was able to show
my full power!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But my fans are expecting more from me! I have
to go beyond my current limit!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Woooo! I'm getting super fired up! I'll surpass my
limits a million times over if I have to!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...While I'm over here making excuses about how
maybe the distance was too long, or I just wasn't
ready...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...No wonder the spotlight is always on her.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: And it will continue to stay on her... forever.
